prompt:
Vertical 9:16 cinematic devotional oil painting video clip, slower pacing with longer holds and restrained cuts.

Classical devotional oil painting realism. Warm lamplight falls across an aged man's face and an open parchment at the left, while a cold stormy light falls on a distant cross at the right across a band of deep shadow; visible brushwork, craquelure, aged varnish throughout.

Scene contains:
An aged man with a grey-streaked beard, in a deep-blue robe, is seated at a wooden table at the left, a feather pen held still above an open parchment scroll, a small brass lamp glowing beside it. At the right, across a dark vertical divide, the crucified Christ stands on a distant cross upon a far hill beneath a stormy sky, two pale dice resting on the ground below. The scene is a painted tableau — a frozen moment, not an action. Nothing moves; this is a still painting.

Scene:
Start on full composition — the seated man at his table at left, the distant cross at right.

Cut to mid framing — the man's face and shoulders in the lamplight.

Cut to close-up — the weathered face, eyes lowered toward the parchment.

Cut to insert — the feather pen held still above the open parchment.

Cut to insert — the small brass lamp and its flame on the table.

Cut to upper framing — the crucified figure on the distant cross beneath the stormy sky.

Cut to lower framing — the two pale dice resting on the ground at the right.

Return to full composition.

End hold spanning the writer at his lamp and the far cross.

Micro-motion:
- minimal
- lamp flame stirs as painted light only

Camera:
- crop-based reframing only
- no invented movement

Emotion:
A quiet wonder across a thousand years.

No added elements.

10.0s

9:16
negative_prompt: no camera invention, no zoom invented, no pan invented, no push-in invented, no dolly, no tracking, no rotation, no animated subject motion, no figures moving, no morphing, no scene morphing, no facial morphing, no glow added, no light rays added beyond what is painted, no atmospheric haze, no scene enhancement, no divine effects added, no smooth transitions, no motion blur, no reinterpretation, no new elements, no text, no watermarks, no extra limbs, no flickering, no warping, no animation, no action, no subject performs any task, no body motion, no limbs moving, the painting is fixed and frozen, only the camera reframes within the still image
